words.definition: A group of people related by blood or marriage, such as parents and children.
words.example: I love my family very much.

words.definition: A place where children go to learn and study.
words.example: We go to school from Monday to Friday.
words.example_translation: 我們從星期一到星期五去上學。

words.definition: A person who helps students learn new things in school.
words.example: My teacher is very kind.

words.definition: A person you like and play with, but who is not part of your family.
words.example: She is my best friend.

words.definition: In good condition; not sick.
words.example: Eating vegetables makes you healthy.

words.definition: Physical activity that makes your body strong and fit.
words.example: We exercise every day at recess.
words.example_translation: 我們每天在課間休息時做運動。

words.definition: To process used materials into new products to help the environment.
words.example: Please recycle your paper bottles.

words.definition: Having good manners; saying please and thank you.
words.example: Be polite to your classmates.

words.definition: To pay attention to sounds or what someone is saying.
words.example: Listen carefully when the teacher speaks.
words.example_translation: 當老師說話時要仔細聆聽。

words.definition: To give some of your things to others so everyone can use them.
words.example: It is nice to share toys with friends.
words.example_translation: 和朋友分享玩具是很好的。

words.definition: The state of being protected from harm or danger.
words.example: Hold the handrail for safety on the stairs.
words.example_translation: 在樓梯上扶著扶手以確保安全。

words.definition: A group of people living in the same area or having a particular characteristic in common.
words.example: Our community has a nice park.
words.example_translation: 我們的社區有一個漂亮的公園。

words.definition: To treat others with care and kindness because they are important.
words.example: We respect our elders and teachers.

words.definition: The condition of the air outside, such as sunny, rainy, or windy.
words.example: Check the weather before you go out.

words.definition: Vehicles used to carry people or goods from one place to another.
words.example: We take the bus to school.

words.definition: Conditions or practices that help to maintain health and prevent disease, like washing hands.
words.example: Good hygiene means washing your hands often.
words.example_translation: 良好的衛生習慣意味著經常洗手。

words.definition: To watch something carefully to notice details.
words.example: Observe the plants growing in the garden.
words.example_translation: 觀察花園裡生長的植物。

words.definition: Being trustworthy and doing what you are supposed to do.
words.example: A responsible student finishes homework on time.
words.example_translation: 負責任的學生按時完成功課。

words.definition: The natural world, including land, water, and air, around us.
words.example: We should protect the environment.

words.definition: To work together with others to achieve a common goal.
words.example: We cooperate to clean the classroom.
